**T015 refresh and recovery contract**:

- Compare final authoring runtime and manifest bytes with the persisted installed inventory first. If they match, do not remove or reinstall authoring.
- If they differ, capture the exact enabled set, profile bytes/hash, source identity, inventory digest, and installed files; remove the inventory-matching revision through compose before reinstalling final source through compose; never alter coding or hand-edit profile/installed artifacts.
- On failure, remove whichever revision is currently inventory-bound before restoring matching source and adding it normally. A compose rollback failure leaves T015 blocked with exact observed source, profile, inventory, enabled-set, and installed-artifact evidence.
